info.title: Open Archiver API
info.description: REST API for Open Archiver — an open-source email archiving platform. All authenticated endpoints require a Bearer JWT token obtained from `POST /v1/auth/login`, or an API key passed as a Bearer token.

bearerAuth.description: JWT obtained from `POST /v1/auth/login`. Pass as `Authorization: Bearer <token>`.

apiKeyAuth.name: X-API-KEY
apiKeyAuth.description: API key generated via `POST /v1/api-keys`. Pass as `X-API-KEY: <key>`.

Unauthorized.description: Authentication is required or the token is invalid/expired.

Forbidden.description: The authenticated user is not allowed to perform this action.

NotFound.description: The requested resource was not found.

InternalServerError.description: An unexpected error occurred on the server.

key.description: Partial/masked key — the raw value is only available at creation time.

SafeIngestionSource.description: An ingestion source with sensitive credential fields removed.

providerConfig.description: Provider-specific configuration. See the ingestion source guides for the required fields per provider.

storageHashSha256.description: SHA-256 hash of the raw email file, stored at archival time.

thread.description: Other emails in the same thread, ordered by sentAt. Only present on single-email GET responses.

hits.description: Array of matching archived email objects, potentially with highlighted fields.

processingTimeMs.description: Meilisearch query processing time in milliseconds.

type.description: Whether this result is for the email itself or one of its attachments.

filename.description: Attachment filename. Only present when `type` is `attachment`.

isValid.description: True if the stored and computed hashes match.

storedHash.description: SHA-256 hash stored at archival time.

computedHash.description: SHA-256 hash computed during this verification run.

error.description: Shorthand copy of `failedReason` for easier access.

totalStorageUsed.description: Total storage used by all archived emails in bytes.

failedIngestionsLast7Days.description: Number of ingestion sources in error state updated in the last 7 days.

IngestionSourceStats.description: Summary of an ingestion source including its storage usage.

storageUsed.description: Total bytes stored for emails from this ingestion source.

RecentSync.description: Summary of a recent sync session.

IndexedInsights.description: Insights derived from the search index.

post.description: Generates a new API key for the authenticated user. The raw key value is only returned once at creation time. The key name must be between 1–255 characters. Expiry is required and must be within 730 days (2 years). Disabled in demo mode.

201.description: API key created. The raw `key` value is only shown once.

key.description: The raw API key. Store this securely — it will not be shown again.

400.description: Validation error (name too short/long, expiry out of range).

get.description: Returns all API keys belonging to the currently authenticated user. The raw key value is not included.

200.description: List of API keys (without raw key values).

delete.description: Permanently revokes and deletes an API key by ID. Only the owning user can delete their own keys. Disabled in demo mode.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the API key to delete.

204.description: API key deleted. No content returned.

get.summary: List archived emails for an ingestion source
get.description: Returns a paginated list of archived emails belonging to the specified ingestion source. Requires authentication.

parameters.name: ingestionSourceId
parameters.description: The ID of the ingestion source to retrieve emails for.

get.description: Retrieves the full details of a single archived email by ID, including attachments and thread. Requires authentication.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the archived email.

delete.description: Permanently deletes an archived email by ID. Deletion must be enabled in system settings and the email must not be on legal hold. Requires authentication.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the archived email to delete.

204.description: Email deleted successfully. No content returned.

400.description: Deletion is disabled in system settings, or the email is blocked by a retention policy / legal hold.

post.description: Creates the initial administrator user. Can only be called once when no users exist.

201.description: Admin user created and logged in successfully.

403.description: Setup has already been completed (users already exist).

post.description: Authenticates a user with email and password and returns a JWT access token.

get.description: Returns whether the application has been set up (i.e., whether an admin user exists).

needsSetup.description: True if no admin user exists and setup is required.

get.description: Returns high-level statistics including total archived emails, total storage used, and failed ingestions in the last 7 days. Requires authentication.
Returns time-series data of email ingestion counts for the last 30 days. Requires authentication.

200.description: Ingestion history wrapped in a `history` array.

get.description: Returns a summary list of ingestion sources with their storage usage. Requires authentication.
Returns the most recent sync sessions across all ingestion sources. Requires authentication.
Returns top-sender statistics from the search index. Requires authentication.

post.description: Creates a new ingestion source and validates the connection. Returns the created source without credentials. Requires authentication.

400.description: Invalid input or connection test failed.

get.description: Returns all ingestion sources accessible to the authenticated user. Credentials are excluded from the response. Requires authentication.
Returns a single ingestion source by ID. Credentials are excluded. Requires authentication.

put.description: Updates configuration for an existing ingestion source. Requires authentication.

delete.description: Permanently deletes an ingestion source. Deletion must be enabled in system settings. Requires authentication.

204.description: Ingestion source deleted. No content returned.

post.description: Enqueues an initial import job for the ingestion source. This imports all historical emails. Requires authentication.

202.description: Initial import job accepted and queued.

post.description: Sets the ingestion source status to `paused`, stopping continuous sync. Requires authentication.

200.description: Ingestion source paused. Returns the updated source.

post.description: Triggers an out-of-schedule continuous sync for the ingestion source. Requires authentication.

202.description: Force sync job accepted and queued.

get.description: Verifies the SHA-256 hash of an archived email and all its attachments against the hashes stored at archival time. Returns per-item integrity results. Requires authentication.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: UUID of the archived email to verify.

200.description: Integrity check results for the email and its attachments.

get.description: Returns all BullMQ job queues and their current job counts broken down by status. Requires authentication.
Returns a paginated list of jobs within a specific queue, filtered by status. Requires authentication.

parameters.name: queueName
parameters.description: The name of the queue (e.g. `ingestion` or `indexing`).

200.description: Detailed view of the queue including paginated jobs.

get.description: Performs a full-text search across indexed archived emails using Meilisearch. Requires authentication.

parameters.name: matchingStrategy
parameters.description: Meilisearch matching strategy. `last` returns results containing at least one keyword; `all` requires all keywords; `frequency` sorts by keyword frequency.

get.description: Returns non-sensitive system settings such as language, timezone, and feature flags. This endpoint is public — no authentication required. Sensitive settings are never exposed.
Downloads a file from the configured storage backend (local filesystem or S3-compatible). The path is sanitized to prevent directory traversal attacks. Requires authentication.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: The relative storage path of the file to download.

200.description: The file content as a binary stream. The `Content-Disposition` header is set to trigger a browser download.

400.description: File path is required or invalid.

post.description: Uploads a file (PST, EML, MBOX, or other) to temporary storage for subsequent use in an ingestion source. Returns the storage path, which should be passed as `uploadedFilePath` when creating a file-based ingestion source. Requires authentication.

200.description: File uploaded successfully. Returns the storage path.

filePath.description: The storage path of the uploaded file. Use this as `uploadedFilePath` when creating a file-based ingestion source.

get.description: Returns the profile of the currently authenticated user.

patch.description: Updates the email, first name, or last name of the currently authenticated user. Disabled in demo mode.

post.description: Updates the password of the currently authenticated user. The current password must be provided for verification. Disabled in demo mode.
